case_title: LAN YU KUAN VS. BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---CAN CHEN. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEVE SHATZ--THIRD PARTY CLAIMS ADMINISTRATOR. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY KUAN, LAN YU AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUAN, LAN YU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
